resources.string: Choose the language used by the app
Remove lines from training when repetitions reach zero
Hide exhausted lines from the training editor
Skip completion dialog and move to the next line
No moves yet. Import a PGN or add moves on the board.
Something went wrong. Please try again.
Delete all lines, positions, trainings, templates and statistics? This cannot be undone.
Report bugs or suggest features on GitHub
Choose what you want to do.
Build a training from saved lines
Set up a custom board position
Export all lines to a PGN file
No trainings match the current filters.
Create at least one opening or line before opening Trainings.
Create at least one opening or line before starting Smart Training.
Create at least one training before starting Smart Training.

No lines are due right now.

Lines with no mistakes are skipped until 3 days have passed. If nothing is due at 3 days, lines from 5+ days ago are shown instead.

Try turning on "Only Lines with Mistakes" to train lines you have not perfected yet.
We use a smart repetition system to help you remember openings more effectively:
— included next, until you nail it
— reviewed after 3 days; if nothing is due at 3 days, after 5 days
This way, you focus more on what you struggle with, while still reinforcing what you already know — so nothing gets forgotten.
Skip well-known lines, focus on errors
Paste PGN here... e.g., 1. e4 e5 2. Nf3 Nc6 3. Bb5
No valid moves found in PGN text
Could not read the selected file
None of the imported chapters could be saved
None of the imported lines could be saved
Lines were saved, but training could not be created
Lines were saved, but template could not be created

plurals.name: create_opening_training_prompt
plurals.item: Do you want to create a training from the saved line?
Do you want to create a training from the %1$d saved lines?

plurals.name: create_opening_template_prompt
plurals.item: Do you want to create a template from the saved line?
Do you want to create a template from the %1$d saved lines?

resources.string: Open lines with selected branch position
No saved positions match the current filter.
Found lines could not be saved as a template.
No opening deviations found for this saved position.
This can take a while. Cancel to stop the analysis.
%1$d deviation positions were found for this saved position. Open the list to inspect them.
Enter a name for this position.
This search position has already been saved.
This exact position has already been saved.
Found lines could not be saved as a template.
Found lines could not be saved as a training.
Name the template created from the matched lines.
No saved lines contain this position.

plurals.name: position_search_found_lines_message
plurals.item: %1$d saved line matches this position. Choose what to create from it.
%1$d saved lines match this position. Choose what to create from them.

resources.string: Create a PGN backup or restore lines later.
Restore lines from the selected backup file?
No lines were found in the selected backup.
Failed to open the selected backup file
Failed to open the selected destination
Choose a file name. On the next step Android will ask where to save the backup file.
Template lines could not be exported to PGN.
Template PGN was copied to the clipboard.
Save training changes before leaving this screen?
Training must include at least one line.
Save training before leaving this screen?
Training formula settings were reset to defaults.
Reset training formula settings to defaults?
Save formula settings before leaving this screen?
Only these latest results per line are used for average mistakes and perfect rate. The attempt boost still uses the total recorded attempts.
Last mistakes contribution = last mistake weight * min(last training mistakes, max last mistakes).
Average mistakes contribution = average mistakes weight * min(average mistakes from recent results, max average mistakes).
Recency contribution = recency weight * min(days since last training, recency days cap). Never-trained lines use 0 days here and are handled by the no-attempts boost.
Perfect rate is the share of recent results with zero mistakes. Penalty = perfect rate penalty * perfect rate, and it is subtracted from score.
Boost depends on total attempts for the line: 0 attempts uses no attempts boost, 1 attempt uses one attempt boost, 2 attempts uses two attempts boost, and 3+ attempts add 0.

After score is calculated, thresholds convert score to raw line weight. They must stay in strict descending order: Weight 5 > Weight 4 > Weight 3 > Weight 2. The Max weight limit on the training screen can still cap the final weight.
Score = last mistake part + average mistake part + recency part + attempt boost - perfect penalty.
Last mistake part = last mistake weight * min(last training mistakes, max last mistakes).
Average mistake part = average mistakes weight * min(average recent mistakes, max average mistakes).
Recency part = recency weight * min(days since last training, recency days cap).
Perfect penalty = perfect rate penalty * recent perfect-training rate.
Higher scores select lines earlier. Weight thresholds then map the score to weight 1-5.
The selected training is unavailable to start.
The selected line is unavailable to start.
The selected line no longer belongs to this training.
The %1$s side is completed. Continue with the next side or repeat this variation.
You reached the end of the line. Repeat the variation or finish this training.
Training line PGN could not be built.
Training line PGN was copied to the clipboard.
Analysis PGN was copied to the clipboard.
Analysis PGN could not be built.
No lines match the current filter.
No saved lines.\nGo to Home to create openings.
Lines PGN could not be built.
Lines PGN was copied to the clipboard.
Removing lines from the explorer results...
Search only lines marked as dubious

plurals.name: lines_explorer_delete_lines_message
plurals.item: Delete %1$d line from the current explorer results? This cannot be undone.
Delete %1$d lines from the current explorer results? This cannot be undone.
